name: TWFG, Inc.
description: TWFG, Inc. operates an independent distribution platform for personal and commercial insurance products in the United States. Founded in 2001 and headquartered in The Woodlands, Texas, the company partners with hundreds of insurance carriers to provide a wide range of coverage options, including auto, homeowners, umbrella, and business insurance. TWFG is committed to a customer-centric approach, emphasizing personalized service and competitive pricing to help individuals, families, and small businesses protect against life's uncertainties. The company serves as a comprehensive resource for insurance solutions, guiding clients through the selection process to ensure optimal coverage.
